description.zh-cn: 抽奖转盘：配置奖品(谢谢参与/积分/优惠券)与中奖权重、库存，按每日抽奖次数限制让会员抽奖。中积分自动入账(复用 Points)，中券自动发放到券包(复用 Coupon/CouponCenter 券池)，含中奖记录与统计。前台抽奖 API。
description.en: Lucky draw: configure prizes (thanks/points/coupon) with weights and stock, limit draws per day per member. Points are credited via Points; coupons issued into the claim pool; with draw records and stats. Storefront draw API.
